series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to the Auditor of States agency budget. Documents include, but are not limited to: budget narratives, expenditure justifications, executive budget proposals, spending authority adjustments, OBM reports that reference appropriations, internal budget plans and projections, reports and supporting budget documentation and tables, documents that support the development of each biennium/annual budget, documents that support entries into OAKS budget and planning module, divisional budget analysis, payroll journals, budget journals and budget transfer, and other materials relating to specific budget issues during the biennium.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: 4 fiscal years ; Paper: while needed, an electronic version has been created and verified accuracy
